metadata.label: gen2/Discord-DBInfra
metadata.title: Software Engineer- Database Infrastructure
metadata.team_direction: Discord is a platform used by over 200 million people for gaming communication and interaction

revision_priority: Add genuine Rust evidence or remove this resume from consideration for this JD because Rust is mandatory.
Rewrite one core experience bullet to show explicit database-infrastructure ownership instead of broad backend/data collaboration.
portfolio_review.main_failure_reason: Add genuine Rust evidence or remove this resume from consideration for this JD because Rust is mandatory.

findings.issue: This is a specialized Database Infrastructure role, but the resume only demonstrates adjacent backend/data-platform work. There is no direct evidence of DB reliability, replication/failover, query-path, storage-path, or HA ownership.
findings.fix: Add one bullet in the most relevant experience that names PostgreSQL/Scylla/Cassandra/HA/replication/query tuning/failover/debugging ownership with a concrete action and result.

findings.issue: Rust is explicitly signaled in the JD responsibilities/preferred section, but the resume never shows Rust in Skills or bullets; the systems story is carried by Go/Java/C++ only.
findings.fix: If Rust work is real, surface it in Skills and one bullet; if not, do not imply Rust-heavy experience.

findings.issue: The newest TikTok segment is almost entirely percentage lifts without any Tier 1 scale/scope anchor, so the opening reads like outcome reporting rather than infra ownership.
findings.fix: Add a concrete scale signal to the first bullet or adjacent bullet, such as services touched, requests/day, environments, SLO, release cadence, or data volume.

revision_priority: [MUST] Add one direct database-infrastructure ownership bullet in the most relevant experience, with PostgreSQL/HA/replication/query-path/storage-path evidence.
[SHOULD] Surface Rust only if it is real; otherwise avoid presenting the resume as Rust-heavy.
[SHOULD] Add one Tier 1 scale/scope signal to the newest TikTok experience so the opening reads as infrastructure ownership, not only percentage outcomes.
[NICE] Keep the rest of the quantification, but bias the first bullet of each role toward ownership and system boundary.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] 先把最相关经历改成数据库基础设施叙事：补一条真实的 PostgreSQL/HA/replication/query-path/slow-query/debugging 证据，让 Discord 这个 Database Infrastructure 岗能一眼看到 substrate ownership。若确有 Rust 经验，把 Rust 明确写进 Skills 和一条正文 bullet；如果没有，就不要继续暗示 Rust-heavy fit。最后，把 TikTok 最新段的第一条 bullet 加上 1 个 Tier 1 规模/边界信号，降低纯百分比结果的观感。
